chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6109 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No. 25860/2021 3. For hearing of main case 07.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Yousuf, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Imtiaz Ali Solangi, advocate for respondent Mr. Ameer Nausherwan Adil, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this matter is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this court in the case of Wazir Ali Industries Ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan reported as 2022 126 Tax 191 (H..C. Kar.) and may be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
